tasks.label: remove-r2-sri
args: $root='c:\Users\mpro\Desktop\mprnew\mpr-main'; Get-ChildItem -Path $root -Recurse -File -Filter *.html | ForEach-Object { $p=$_.FullName; $c=Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $p; $n=$c -replace ' integrity="[^"]*" crossorigin="anonymous"','' -replace ' crossorigin="anonymous" integrity="[^"]*"',''; if($n -ne $c){ Set-Content -LiteralPath $p -Value $n -Encoding utf8 } }
